creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to arrowd from comment #2)
> Shouldn't it be haskell@FreeBSD.org?

Probably. Nothing is assigned to freebsd-haskell@ and having both variants spams the mailing list with duplicate mails.

> Once the exp-run is done, it will be assigned to haskell@

This is confusing given comment 1. Did you queue another exp-run?
